title: package.json without a lockfile
description: Missing lockfile means dependency resolution is non-reproducible; upstream package drift can silently introduce vulnerabilities.

title: AI/LLM project — manual review recommended
description: Project integrates LLMs. Verify: (1) prompt-injection hardening on untrusted input, (2) output sanitization before rendering, (3) API-key handling via env vars, not source, (4) rate limiting / cost caps, (5) PII redaction if user data is sent to external APIs.
